fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user for whom you want to define permissions.

fields.name: Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the object ID of the report.

fields.name: Printer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the printer that the user will be allowed to use or on which the report will be printed.

fields.name: Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the display name of the report.
